## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Lovable project and align on next steps for template generation and gallery improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Lovable approved the experience and templates; they're a happy customer](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on diversifying blog templates while maintaining quality threshold](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Developing a pipeline for generating high-quality, diverse templates using AI and pre-selected components](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Gallery improvements needed: mobile optimization, sticky elements for conversion](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2991.0)

## Topics

### Project Status Update

  - [Lovable has approved the experience and templates](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Team is working on productizing the gallery](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [PRs for guides are open and ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Pipeline for template production is being developed](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)

### Template Generation Strategy

  - [Aim to diversify blog templates while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Develop a pipeline using AI to generate templates based on pre-selected components](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)
  - [Focus on creating distinct styles with tasteful output](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2216.0)
  - [Use Daniel's prompt as a starting point, but modify for Lovable's needs](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Create a database of components (headers, fonts, colors) categorized by style (e.g., professional, playful)](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2401.0)

### Gallery Improvements

  - [Mobile optimization needed: preview should be at the top](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2991.0)
  - [Add sticky elements for better conversion (e.g., CTA bar at the top when scrolling)](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2991.0)
  - [Consider adding a prompt box for remixing templates directly in the gallery view](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=3072.0)

### AI-Powered Template Generation

  - [Utilize Daniel's pipeline for generating brand concepts and mock data](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
  - [Develop a system to select appropriate fonts, components, and styles based on the generated brand personality](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Start with landing pages, then expand to other template types](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2892.0)
  - [Aim to demo high-quality templates by Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2870.0)

### Workflow and Tools

  - [Use 21st.dev for inspiration and pre-made components](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
  - [Explore Cloud browser extension for AI-assisted browsing](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=3172.0)
  - [Balance between using AI for code generation and maintaining code quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/7ELTQqoPeS8dTCfHcSMRqiGA6rKSsgaj?tab=summary&timestamp=3348.0)
